name: Vanilla Scented Butter Sauce
recipeIngredient: 3 Cups flavorful quail or chicken stock
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté the shallots and mushrooms in 2 tablespoons of butter until lightly browned.
2. Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of unsalted butter to the skillet and gently cook the shallots and mushrooms.
3. Pour in the flavorful quail or chicken stock and dry white wine. Reduce the mixture by half over medium heat.
4. Stir in the heavy cream and scrape the soft center of the vanilla bean into the sauce.
5. Reduce the temperature and allow the sauce to simmer until it reaches a light consistency, about 15-20 minutes.
6. Strain the sauce through a fine mesh sieve into a clean bowl or pan.
7. Correct the seasoning with drops of lemon juice, salt, and freshly ground black pepper.
8. Whisk in the remaining butter in bits until fully incorporated.
9. Keep the sauce warm by placing it over a low heat or in a warm water bath until serving time (up to 2 hours).
